{{Infobox location
| name = Sky's Edge
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Sky's Edge Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sky's Edge is a seaside location characterized by a powerful ice [[aura]] and strong [[earth aura]], the latter of which has petrified nearby trees. The area features a canyon and was once home to a town, though much of the original settlement has been destroyed. A fortress built by the [[Seishen Kingdom]] stands at its border, though it has suffered significant damage. The region is currently a site of great danger due to the presence of a feeding [[Dreadgod]] and a massive, sleeping [[Wandering Titan]] resting in the bay. This [[Titan]]'s dark stone hand is large enough to crush houses and its fingers resemble collapsed towers. Current objectives in the area include protecting survivors, securing a mine, clearing out [[dreadbeasts]], and evacuating citizens before the [[Titan]] awakens. Access to the territory is managed through a portal or [[gate]] that can be expanded into a large screen of darkness.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky's Edge serves as the destination for the [[Akura expedition]] and a location that [[Charity]] must visit periodically, though she cannot transport people there on her own. Characterized by a powerful ice [[aura]] and strong [[earth aura]], the area contains a fortress raised by the [[Seishen king]] and ruined homes marked by a visible stone hand. As the [[Akura]] cloudship approached, the [[Abyssal Palace]] moved to hover over the location, which also became a site where people face [[dragons]] on the battlefield. During the events of the story, [[Lindon]] stayed there for his first night, and later, [[Fury]] and others found themselves pinned within the area. The site is also known for containing prizes and crates filled with items from enemies or a mine.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is the location where the [[Akura expedition]] is arriving.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location [[Charity]] must visit periodically.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location of powerful ice [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge is a location where [[Lindon]] stayed for his first night.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura]] cloudship approached [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge is a land with very strong [[earth aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] will return to Sky’s Edge after the next tournament round.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] moved over Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is the location where [[Abyssal Palace]] hovers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A flight of [[dragons]] is poised to cross the continent toward Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a place where people face [[dragons]] on the battlefield.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location with prizes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location that [[Aunt Charity]] cannot transport people to on her own.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge is a destination for the group.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location being approached by the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge contains a fortress raised by the [[Seishen king]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] and others are pinned in [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A stone hand is visible above the ruined homes of Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge is a fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sky’s Edge is a location where [[Xorrus]] gave a sigh.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location located a few miles away from where an [[Icon]] was manifested.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Crates taken from Sky’s Edge contained items from a mine or from enemies.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Sky's Edge was a seaside town that was reached via a portal and served as the site of a battle involving Sophara and [[Lindon]]. During the conflict, [[Charity]] expanded the town's [[gate]] into a wide screen of darkness, and the settlement was ultimately destroyed. Following its destruction, the [[Wandering Titan]] took a stride that crossed the space where the town had once been located. The titan was later seen sleeping in the bay outside Sky's Edge before eventually marching eastward from the area.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location where Sophara fought.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] contributed to the cause during the fight for Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Sky’s Edge is a location reached via a portal.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sky's Edge]] is a [[gate]] that [[Charity]] expanded into a broad screen of darkness.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sky's Edge]] is a seaside town that was destroyed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wandering Titan]] took a stride that crossed the space where Sky’s Edge once stood.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wandering Titan]] was seen sleeping in the bay outside Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wandering Titan]] marched eastward from [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sky's Edge]] is a location [[Yan Shoumei]] escaped from.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“While the weather in Sky’s Edge is no threat to an Underlord, we are arriving at a location of powerful ice aura, so dress accordingly, she said.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
